summary: Iteration 136: Tested Trade Circle Marketplace backend APIs and frontend. All 11 backend tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend Trade Circle page loads correctly with auth, category filters, tabs, and listings grid. Widget z-index management (SmartDock + CosmicToolbar) working correctly with bring-to-front functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade Circle Marketplace fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/auth/login (returns token), GET /api/trade-circle/listings (returns listings array), POST /api/trade-circle/listings (creates listing), GET /api/trade-circle/stats (returns trade stats with karma), GET /api/trade-circle/categories (returns 6 wellness categories - no auth required), GET /api/trade-circle/trust-score/{user_id} (returns trust_score, trust_tier, breakdown), GET /api/trade-circle/karma-leaderboard (returns leaderboard array), POST /api/trade-circle/offers (creates offer), POST /api/trade-circle/offers/{id}/respond (accept/decline), POST /api/trade-circle/offers/{id}/handshake (Cosmic Handshake). Frontend: Trade Circle page at /trade-circle loads with auth, shows stats, tabs (Browse, My Listings, My Offers, Karma Board), category filters (All, Readings, Healing, Guidance, Meditation, Crafted, Goods, Services), listings grid, create listing modal. Widget z-index fix verified: SmartDock and CosmicToolbar use WIDGET_FOCUS_KEY with CustomEvent 'widget-focus' for bring-to-front (z-index 9999 for focused, 9997 for unfocused).

backend_api_tests.test_01_login_returns_token: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns token with valid credentials
backend_api_tests.test_02_categories_returns_wellness_cate: PASS - GET /api/trade-circle/categories returns 6 wellness categories (readings, healing, guidance, meditation, crafted, other)
backend_api_tests.test_03_get_listings_with_auth: PASS - GET /api/trade-circle/listings returns listings array with auth
backend_api_tests.test_04_create_listing_with_auth: PASS - POST /api/trade-circle/listings creates a new listing with auth
backend_api_tests.test_05_get_trade_stats_with_auth: PASS - GET /api/trade-circle/stats returns trade statistics with karma
backend_api_tests.test_06_get_trust_score_with_auth: PASS - GET /api/trade-circle/trust-score/{user_id} returns trust_score, trust_tier, and breakdown
backend_api_tests.test_08_create_offer_on_listing: PASS - POST /api/trade-circle/offers creates an offer on a listing
backend_api_tests.test_09_get_my_offers: PASS - GET /api/trade-circle/my-offers returns sent and received sections
backend_api_tests.test_10_respond_to_offer: SKIP - No pending offers available to respond to
backend_api_tests.test_11_cosmic_handshake_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/trade-circle/offers/{id}/handshake endpoint exists and returns 404 for non-existent offer

frontend_tests.trade_circle_page_loads: PASS - Trade Circle page loads at /trade-circle with auth
frontend_tests.create_listing_modal: PASS - Create listing modal opens on click with form elements
frontend_tests.category_filter_buttons: PASS - 8 category filter buttons rendered (All, Readings, Healing, Guidance, Meditation, Crafted, Goods, Services)
frontend_tests.tabs_rendered: PASS - 4 tabs rendered (Browse, My Listings, My Offers, Karma Board)
frontend_tests.my_offers_tab: PASS - My Offers tab shows sent and received sections
frontend_tests.listings_grid: PASS - Listings grid displays trade listings

widget_zindex_tests.bring_to_front_smartdock: PASS - Clicking SmartDock brings it to z-index 9999
widget_zindex_tests.bring_to_front_cosmictoolbar: PASS - Clicking CosmicToolbar brings it to z-index 9999
widget_zindex_tests.separate_zindex_management: PASS - Both widgets have separate z-index management via CustomEvent 'widget-focus'

bug_fix_applied.issue: Backend create_listing endpoint only accepted 'goods', 'services', 'both' as categories, but frontend and categories endpoint use wellness categories
bug_fix_applied.fix: Updated category validation to accept wellness categories: readings, healing, guidance, meditation, crafted, other (plus legacy goods, services, both)
